title: Presentation Control (0x83)
description: Presentation control triplet layout. (Do not include triplet length or TID here.)

values.0: Specified object is intended for viewing (architected default if omitted)
values.1: Specified object is not intended for viewing

values.0: Specified object is intended to be indexed (architected default if omitted)
values.1: Specified object is not intended to be indexed
